tree.name: Cam Spencer
tree.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: MEM traded Ulrich Chomche to TOR and 2030 2nd (MEM own) to MIN; DET traded Cam Spencer to MEM; MIN traded Bobi Klintman and Wendell Moore Jr. to DET; TOR traded to MIN
tree.note: UConn guard, acquired from Detroit in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#57)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Grizzlies traded Steven Adams to Rockets for Victor Oladipo, a 2024 2nd round pick (#39, Jaylen Wells), a 2024 2nd round pick (#57, Ulrich Chomche) and a 2025 2nd round pick (Will Richard)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick acquired from Houston in Steven Adams trade; Chomche drafted 57th, sent to Toronto in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Steven Adams
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MEM traded Jonas Valanciunas, Trey Murphy III (#17), and Brandon Boston Jr. (#51) to NOP; NOP traded Steven Adams, Eric Bledsoe, Jared Butler, Ziaire Williams, 2022 2nd (Vince Williams Jr.) and 2025 2nd to MEM; Charlotte involved in side deals
assetsGivenUp.note: Kiwi center; acquired from New Orleans in JV 3-team trade, then traded to Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: Jonas Valanciunas
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Marc Gasol to Toronto for C.J. Miles, Jonas Valanciunas, Delon Wright and a 2024 2nd round pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Lithuanian center, acquired from Toronto in Marc Gasol trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Marc Gasol
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MEM traded Pau Gasol to LAL for Marc Gasol and others
assetsGivenUp.note: Spanish center from the Pau Gasol blockbuster

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#17)
assetsGivenUp.note: MEM's own 2021 1st round pick, used to draft Trey Murphy III and sent to NOP in JV/Adams trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#51)
assetsGivenUp.note: MEM's own 2021 2nd round pick, used to draft Brandon Boston Jr. and sent to NOP in JV/Adams trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis' own 2030 second-round pick, sent to Minnesota
